title: cmd+K global command palette
description: Keyboard shortcut cmd+K opens centered modal. Fuzzy search: sessions/workspaces/accounts/audit/settings. Default action per result type. Recent-commands ring buffer. ↑↓ enter + ESC keyboard nav. 12+ tests.

context.text: Implemented dashboard Cmd/Ctrl+K command palette over real dashboard state. Added fuzzy search for sessions, workspaces, accounts, audit findings, settings, recent-result persistence, keyboard navigation, and E2E screenshot coverage. Verification: npm run typecheck:dashboard; npm run build; npm test -- --runInBand tests/dashboardComponents.test.ts; npm test -- --runInBand; PROJECT_SCREENSHOT_DIR=/Users/luke/Desktop/screenshots/sweech npm run test:e2e:dashboard. Screenshot proof: ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-028-command-palette-desktop.png.
